SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO KEEPER OF THE RECORD BUR. OF AUTOMOBILE REPAIR.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO NOWOTENSKI STAN BUR. OF AUTOMOBILE REPAIR
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY FARMER JOHN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GRANDE GARY DBA VANGUARD MOTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIRS, RECORDS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANDE GARY DBA VANGUARD MOTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARMER JOHN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FARMER JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GRANDE GARY DBA VANGUARD MOTORS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FARMER JOHN
